changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO ACCOUNT ( USER_NAME, MAIL_ADDRESS, PASSWORD, ADMINISTRATOR, REGISTERED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE, GROUP_ACCOUNT, FULL_NAME, REMOVED ) SELECT mu.USER_NAME, CONCAT('missing+', mu.USER_NAME, '@invalid.local'), SUBSTRING( CONCAT( REPLACE(CAST(RANDOM_UUID() AS VARCHAR), '-', ''), REPLACE(CAST(RANDOM_UUID() AS VARCHAR), '-', '') ), 1, 40 ), FALSE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FALSE, mu.USER_NAME, TRUE FROM ( SELECT ORIGIN_USER_NAME AS USER_NAME FROM REPOSITORY WHERE ORIGIN_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT PARENT_USER_NAME AS USER_NAME FROM REPOSITORY WHERE PARENT_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL ) mu LEFT JOIN ACCOUNT ea ON ea.USER_NAME = mu.USER_NAME WHERE ea.USER_NAME IS NULL
